Trap: Must filter StopType to BCT/BCS/BCE — other types are rail, ferry, metro
Must filter ATCO prefix 0xx-4xx for England — bounding box includes Wales (5xx) and Scotland (6xx)
Must filter Status='act' — inactive stops inflate counts
52,449 stops have null Easting/Northing — excluded from spatial join
Includes vans — some stops serve commercial vehicles, skews rural counts
Cross-region deduplication required — same route appears in multiple regional feeds
Stop count ≠ service level — must derive frequency from stop_times.txt
stop_times.txt is 5.8 GB — requires chunked reading
GTFS times can exceed 24:00:00 for services past midnight
frequencies.txt may be empty — all services use exact timetables
BODS stop_id may not always match NaPTAN ATCOCode format
Uses 2021 LSOA boundaries — zero mismatch with Census, but RUC uses 2011 boundaries
Score is NOT linearly proportional to deprivation — use ranks or deciles for comparison
Domain weights are FIXED (e.g., Income 22.5%) — cannot be policy-adjusted
Sub-domain scores may use different scales — cannot compare directly across sub-domains
Population denominator must use Census total (~56.49M), NEVER pipeline-filtered
HOUSEHOLD-level, NOT person-level — do not divide by population
High no-car % is ambiguous: wealthy city centre OR poor deprived area
2021 Census added Roma explicitly — NOT comparable to 2011
Multiple-tick for mixed groups — possible double-counting at sub-category level
Age bands are 5-year groups — cannot get exact age distributions
Our formula uses % of total 16+ pop, not % of economically active — definition matters
Based on 2011 boundaries mapped to 2021 — some edge cases
GeoJSON files are ~1 GB — load once, do all spatial operations
All per-capita metrics must use Census 2021 population as denominator
Region assignment must use spatial join (centroid → region polygon), NOT API
